title: Small Travel Alarm Clock, Silent Analogue Non Ticking Clocks with Snooze Nightlight Function Bedside No Tick Quiet Large Display Mini Alarm Clock for Heavy Sleepers, glow in the dark, 6cm (Blue)
features: Compact and Ideal for Travel: This portable mini alarm clock is small, keeps time well and lightweight. It's easy to store in your backpack, purse, or luggage, making it perfect for road trips, camping, or hotel stays.

Quiet Quartz Movement: Designed for light sleepers, the travel clocks non ticking glow in the dark ensures silent operation without annoying ticking. Enjoy a restful night's sleep with our silent bedside alarm clock.

Snooze and Night Light Function: Conveniently located in the top right corner, you'll find an easy-to-access snooze button and night light - perfect for getting a few extra minutes of sleep or temporarily lighting up the clock face in the dark.

Easy to Use: The simple knob on the back makes our minature illuminous night clock easy to set the time and alarm, ideal for those with fine motor skills issues or for use in the dark. Easy to use for children, seniors and those with fine motor skills issues.

Loud Alarm: This clock comes with a loud bell alarm that is ideal for deep sleepers or the hearing impaired. It will continue to ring until the snooze bar is pressed or the alarm is turned off, otherwise it will get louder.
description: This watch is designed to provide a restful night's sleep with a quiet, non-ticking mechanism. The second hand moves smoothly without making a sound, making it ideal for light sleepers. The snooze and night light functions can be easily activated by pressing the button on the top right, allowing you to rest for an extra 5 minutes or quickly light up the watch face in the dark. Setting the time and alarm is easy. Therefore, it is especially suitable for people with fine motor skills problems or who may adjust the settings in the dark. The loud bell alarm allows even heavy sleepers or people with hearing impairments to wake up on time. Usage Tips To protect the mechanism of the watch, always set the knob according to the marked direction. To extend the life of the watch, we recommend using zinc-carbon batteries instead of alkaline or rechargeable batteries. Do not place the watch in a humid or dusty environment or in a place with corrosive gases. If you will not be using the watch for a long period of time, remove the battery.
